page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.c2 family. It is configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores, operating with a single thread per core and utilizing the KVM hypervisor. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, providing consistent processing capabilities.

The instance features 32.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This 1:2 resource ratio aligns with compute-optimized hardware profiles. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration.

Given the dedicated 16-core compute configuration and 32.0 GB of RAM, this server is designed for workloads requiring sustained CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. Appropriate workloads include batch processing, web serving, distributed analytics, and compute-heavy applications that do not require local storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.large is a compute-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 16 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The server is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for data persistence. This resource profile is designed for sustained, CPU-bound workloads such as batch processing, web serving, and distributed compute tasks that benefit from dedicated physical cores and a balanced compute-to-memory ratio.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c2.large is a compute-optimized x86_64 server featuring 16 dedicated physical cores, 32.0 GB of RAM, and KVM virtualization, designed for sustained CPU-bound workloads.

tagline: A dedicated sixteen-core compute-optimized instance featuring a two-to-one vCPU-to-RAM ratio for sustained processing workloads without hyperthreading.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core
32.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
No integrated local storage or GPU accelerators
Suited for sustained CPU-bound processing and web serving
